//: runtimeVersion is PINNED to the fixed string '2.0.0' (NOT policy:appVersion). Reason: the 2.0.0 build is already live on the App Store with the current native layer, so all binaries that share that native layer must stay in the OTA cohort '2.0.0'. The marketing 'version' below climbs freely for Apple (2.0.1, 2.0.2, ...) WITHOUT moving the OTA cohort. RULE: bump runtimeVersion ONLY when the NATIVE layer changes (new native module / Expo SDK upgrade / native config) — and when you do, rebuild iOS AND Android together. Set 2026-06-19. Consider migrating to policy:'fingerprint' at the next native build that you want as a fresh cohort.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Reglo usa la fotocamera per acquisire foto e documenti utili alla gestione delle pratiche in autoscuola.
